text:
As I first enter the quiet hallway and gaze into the glass-walled room, I feel a sense of anticipation—a liminal moment at the threshold of creativity and discovery. There is solitude here, mixed with the hum of purpose, as though the world slows just before a thought becomes action.

Upon stepping into the vibrant, information-rich gallery, I feel inspired and invigorated. The vivid colors, bold text, and interactive displays awaken my curiosity, inviting deep reflection on innovation and coexistence. Surrounded by ideas—past, present, and future—I sense a collective striving for understanding, and I feel part of something larger: the ongoing story of research and creation.
